positive: Minimalist vector illustration of a whimsical forest scene, featuring stylized woodland animals (fox, owl, rabbit) nestled among giant stylized mushrooms and delicate fern foliage. The art should have clean, bold lines and flat, solid color blocking with subtle gradients for depth. Use a deep emerald green, forest teal, and warm burnt orange palette, contrasted against a creamy off-white background. Composition must be centrally focused, with strong, memorable silhouettes suitable for printing on apparel. Style: Mid-Century Modern folk art meets geometric illustration, highly detailed yet graphic and clean. Perfect for screen printing.
negative: photorealistic, 3d render, depth of field, bokeh, blurry, low detail, noise, watermark, signature, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, messy, grainy, overly complex
